title: GBM-Based JRN Estimation for 11 FK Joins × 4 Tasks on rel-avito
summary: Demo notebook analyzing pre-computed JRN (Join Reproduction Number) measurements from the rel-avito dataset. Loads 39 examples covering 11 FK joins across 3 tasks (ad-ctr, user-clicks, user-visits), parses JRN measurements, reconstructs the JRN matrix, displays training-free proxy correlations (Pearson rho=0.926), probe-to-full validation (Spearman rho=0.825), and aggregation sensitivity analysis. Includes 4-panel visualization: JRN heatmap, direction comparison, probe vs full scatter, and proxy correlation bar chart.
